w073_formatting.required_w043_disposition: Any W043 evidence that exercises aggregate or visualization conditional-formatting metadata must use VerificationConditionalFormattingRule.typed_rule for the named families; reliance on old W072 threshold strings must be recorded as mismatch or blocker.
